ops.body: SHIPPED as b34059d9e5d0 (after rebase onto the operator's 8f454616 stack; full suite re-run green post-rebase; the refuter's test-hermeticity finding fixed pre-ship — default_backend stubbed so the spec-pinning test runs everywhere, including CI). Deviation from the task title, evidence-forced: max_turns is NOT set — the --json-schema path emits structured output as a tool_use round with num_turns 2-4, so max_turns=1 kills 13/14 rows (error_max_turns); tools="" removes the agentic surface instead. Refuter's sibling finding spun off to a new backlog task: profile.py's structured_judge(DistilledProfile) and enrich's cc_transcript extract path still carry the ~32K baseline. Monitor the first nightly pass for JudgeError rate (2/14 transient exit-1s observed in measurement, non-reproducible).
